title: Hire Without Borders. Scale Without Limits. Start with Deel’s All-in-One Global Payroll & HR Platform and get $5K in credits to grow...
description: We are excited to share that we have received special approval to increase our startup offer for the AWS Activate Exclusive Offer by 230%. Deel’s enhanced offer now provides startup founders with up to $5,000 Deel credits (previously $1,500 in credits) to cover the critical early-stage needs of launching and scaling their businesses, significantly expanding on the benefits of our previous offer. These credits can be applied toward running their first U.S. payroll, setting up their business entit
eligibility: AWS Activate members who meet the offer's current provider, account, and regional requirements.
